ai_role: AI accelerator challenger and x86 CPU platform
tvs_tiebreaker: Requires strong TVS, execution evidence, and favorable entry because chokepoint durability is below Tier 1.
technical_timing_rule: Technical timing should gate adds; avoid adding when EXTENDED.
rationale: AMD is a credible AI accelerator and CPU challenger, but it is not the primary chokepoint. The opportunity depends on execution, ecosystem adoption, and share gain against NVIDIA.
